{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Aethertech weapon
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|An [[Aethertech weapon]] can gather and compress conjured water from the [[Aether]] and accelerate the spell to just under lightspeed.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
